home.title: WCPOS
home.subtitle: A fast point of sale for WooCommerce

meta.description: Point of Sale for WooCommerce. Sync your products, sell offline, and connect real hardware with native apps for iOS, Android, and desktop.

sync.headline: One catalog, two channels
sync.description: Your WooCommerce products are your POS products. Update a price or stock level once — it syncs everywhere automatically. No manual entry, no conflicts, no guesswork.
sync.supporting: Same products. Same prices. Same customers. Always in sync.

offline.headline: Works offline
offline.description: Local-first architecture means the POS keeps running when your connection drops. Products are stored locally and open orders are preserved — they complete and sync as soon as the internet returns.
offline.supporting: Never lose an order to internet issues.

hardware.headline: Native apps, real hardware
hardware.description: Native iOS and Android apps — not a browser tab pretending to be an app. Connect payment terminals, receipt printers, and barcode scanners directly.
hardware.supporting: Supports Stripe Terminal, SumUp, and more payment hardware.

ownership.headline: You own everything
ownership.description: Your data stays in your WooCommerce store, on your hosting. No platform lock-in, no third party holding your business hostage. Open source (GPL) — inspect the code, extend it, contribute to it.
ownership.supporting: Open source. Self-hosted. You're in control.

offline.title: Today's Sales
offline.queued: 3 sales queued — syncs when you're back online

features.heading: Built for the demands of physical retail

f1.title: Fast product search
f1.description: Find products instantly with search, filters, and category browsing. Barcode scanner support.

f2.title: Smooth checkout flow
f2.description: Add items, apply discounts, choose payment method. Supports Stripe Terminal, SumUp, cash, and custom gateways.

f3.title: Customer profiles
f3.description: Add and edit customer info directly in the POS. Track regulars, offer better service.

f4.title: Order history & management
f4.description: View past orders, process returns, check order status without switching to WP Admin.

f5.title: Edit stock & prices on the fly
f5.description: Fix a wrong price while serving a customer. Adjust stock without leaving the POS.

f6.title: End-of-day reports
f6.description: Generate sales reports for each shift or day. Cash up quickly, track performance.

pricing.heading: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
pricing.fallback: See full pricing for current Pro options. No per-register fees.

free.title: Free
free.description: Free forever. No transaction fees. No limits.

ecosystem.heading: One ecosystem. Multiple ways to sell.
ecosystem.subtitle: Install the WordPress plugin, then choose your device.

ios.label: iOS & iPadOS
ios.description: Native app with payment terminal and printer support.

android.label: Android
android.description: Native app with full hardware integration.

ecosystem.description: All apps sync with your WooCommerce store via the REST API. Install the free WordPress plugin, then choose your device. Products, stock, and orders stay in sync automatically.

a1.h: Your WooCommerce store, at the counter.
a1.b: WCPOS turns the tablet into your register — same catalog, same stock, same prices, even offline.

a2.h: One POS. Web, desktop, iOS & Android.
a2.b: Run the register on the tablet at the counter, the phone on the shop floor, or the laptop in the back office — same store, same data.

a3.h: Works with the equipment you already have.
a3.b: Card terminals, thermal receipt printers, barcode scanners — WCPOS doesn’t lock you into proprietary hardware. Plug in what’s already on your counter.

a4.h: Synced with WooCommerce. Yours, even offline.
a4.b: Every sale lands in your WooCommerce store — you own the data, no middleman. Internet drops? Keep selling; WCPOS syncs when you’re back online.

static.alt: A shop counter with a tablet running the WCPOS register, a receipt printer, a card terminal and a barcode scanner

pos.tax: Tax based on: Shop base address

meta.title: Roadmap
meta.description: See what we are building next for WCPOS — upcoming features, milestones, and release progress.

page.title: The release train
page.description: Every stop on the way to a faster, offline-proof WCPOS — pulled straight from our GitHub, newest work first.

board.link: live from the WCPOS project board

timeline.empty: No roadmap items to display yet.

bugs.summary: {count, plural, one {+ # bug fix & improvements} other {+ # bug fixes & improvements}}

features.title: Pro에는 무엇이 포함되나요?
features.subtitle: 무료 버전의 모든 기능에 더해, 매장 전체를 계산대에서 운영할 수 있는 도구와 필요할 때 받는 우선 지원까지 제공됩니다.

terminal.title: 결제 단말기 연동
terminal.description: 카드 리더기와 결제 단말기를 연결해 빠르고 정확한 대면 결제를 처리하세요.

stockPrice.title: 재고 및 가격 편집
stockPrice.description: POS에서 바로 재고 수량, 가격, 상품 정보를 업데이트하세요 — WordPress 관리자 페이지로 이동할 필요가 없습니다.

orders.title: 주문 관리
orders.description: 주문 내역을 살펴보고, 지난 주문을 열어보며, 계산대를 떠나지 않고 관리하세요.

customers.title: 고객 관리
customers.description: POS에서 고객 정보를 추가하고 편집하며, WooCommerce와 동기화된 상태를 유지하세요.

reports.title: 마감 보고서
reports.description: 매출, 결제, 수금 내역의 마감 요약으로 계산대를 정산하세요.

gateways.title: 맞춤 결제 게이트웨이
gateways.description: 기본 옵션뿐만 아니라 WooCommerce와 호환되는 모든 게이트웨이로 결제를 받으세요.

buyBox.heading: Pro 구매
buyBox.subheading: 하나의 라이선스, 모든 기능. 업데이트 기간만 선택하세요.
buyBox.proof: 5,000개 이상의 활성 매장 · 연간 결제분은 평생 라이선스에 반영됩니다
buyBox.unavailableTitle: 가격 정보를 일시적으로 사용할 수 없습니다
buyBox.unavailableDescription: 현재 가격 정보를 사용할 수 없습니다. 나중에 다시 시도해 주세요.

freePlugin.question: 무료 플러그인에는 제한이 있나요?
freePlugin.answer: 아니요. 무료 WCPOS 플러그인은 완전한 POS 기능을 갖춘 GPL 소프트웨어입니다 — 상품, 주문, 고객 수 무제한, 거래 수수료 없음. Pro는 위에 나열된 고급 도구를 추가합니다.

yearlyVsLifetime.question: 연간과 평생의 차이는 무엇인가요?
yearlyVsLifetime.answer: 연간 라이선스는 1년간의 업데이트와 우선 지원이 포함된 일회성 결제입니다. 자동으로 갱신되지 않습니다. 평생 라이선스는 영구 업데이트가 포함된 일회성 결제입니다.

upgrade.question: 연간에서 평생으로 업그레이드할 수 있나요?
upgrade.answer: 네! 지원팀에 문의하시면 연간 라이선스의 남은 기간을 평생 라이선스 비용에서 차감해 드립니다.

siteLimits.question: 라이선스를 몇 개의 사이트에서 사용할 수 있나요?
siteLimits.answer: 각 라이선스는 여러 사이트에서 활성화할 수 있습니다. 활성화 한도는 계정 대시보드에서 확인하세요.

paymentMethods.question: 어떤 결제 수단을 지원하나요?
paymentMethods.answer: 신용카드(Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, Bitcoin을 지원합니다.

complete.title: 구매해 주셔서 감사합니다!
complete.description: 라이선스 키와 다운로드 링크가 이메일로 전송되었습니다.

account.emailHint: 이 이메일로 계정을 생성합니다 — 구매 후 라이선스와 영수증이 이곳으로 발송됩니다.
account.existingAccountNotice: 다시 오신 것을 환영합니다 — 이미 계정이 있습니다. 계속하려면 비밀번호를 입력하세요.

errors.passwordFailed: 비밀번호가 맞지 않습니다. Google, GitHub 또는 Discord로 가입했다면 아래 로그인 링크를 사용하거나 로그인 페이지에서 비밀번호를 재설정하세요.
errors.createFailed: 계정을 만들 수 없습니다. 다시 시도하세요.

errors.saveFailed: 청구 주소를 저장할 수 없습니다. 다시 시도하세요.

payment.noneConfigured: 설정된 결제 방법이 없습니다. 지원팀에 문의하세요.

paypal.hint: PayPal 잔액 또는 연결된 카드로 결제

bitcoin.title: Bitcoin
bitcoin.description: QR 코드가 포함된 BTCPay 인보이스가 열립니다 — 온체인 또는 Lightning으로 결제하면 여기로 돌아옵니다.

paypalButton.loadFailed: PayPal을 불러오지 못했습니다. 다른 결제 방법을 시도하세요.

errors.initializeFailed: 결제를 초기화할 수 없습니다. 다시 시도하세요.
errors.checkoutBusy: Checkout is busy. Please try again.
errors.paymentRefreshFailed: Billing address was saved, but we couldn't prepare payment. Please try again.
errors.methodSwitchFailed: We couldn't prepare that payment method. Please try again or choose a different one.
errors.genericPaymentFailed: We were unable to process your payment. Please try again or use a different payment method.
errors.genericCardFailed: Your card could not be charged. Please check your card details, or try a different card or payment method.
errors.unexpectedPaymentStatus: We couldn't confirm the status of your payment. If you think you may have been charged, please contact support before trying again.
errors.orderPending: Your payment was received, but we couldn't finish creating your order. Please do not pay again — contact support and we will finish your order or refund the payment.
errors.paypalFailed: PayPal couldn't complete your payment. You have not been charged — please try again or use a different payment method.
errors.paypalInitFailed: We couldn't start the PayPal checkout. Please try again or use a different payment method.
errors.paypalCancelled: PayPal checkout was cancelled and you have not been charged. You can try again whenever you're ready.
errors.btcpayInitFailed: We couldn't start the Bitcoin payment. You have not been charged — please try again or use a different payment method.

stripeDeclines.insufficientFunds: Your card was declined due to insufficient funds. Please use a different card or payment method.

stripeCodes.cardDeclined: Your card was declined. Please try a different card or payment method.
stripeCodes.expiredCard: Your card has expired. Please use a different card.
stripeCodes.incorrectCvc: Your card's security code is incorrect. Please check it and try again.
stripeCodes.invalidCvc: Your card's security code is invalid. Please check it and try again.
stripeCodes.incorrectNumber: Your card number appears to be invalid. Please check it and try again.
stripeCodes.invalidNumber: Your card number appears to be invalid. Please check it and try again.
stripeCodes.invalidExpiryMonth: Your card's expiry date is invalid. Please check it and try again.
stripeCodes.invalidExpiryYear: Your card's expiry date is invalid. Please check it and try again.
stripeCodes.processingError: Something went wrong while processing your card. You have not been charged — please try again.
stripeCodes.authenticationFailure: We couldn't verify your card with your bank. Please try again or use a different payment method.
stripeCodes.authenticationRequired: We couldn't verify your card with your bank. Please try again or use a different payment method.

recovery.switchMethod: You can also choose a different payment method below.

unknown.title: Payment status unknown
unknown.suffix: and quote reference <reference></reference> — we will confirm whether your payment went through before you pay again.

unsuccessful.title: 결제 실패
unsuccessful.saved: Your order details have been saved, so you can try again without starting over.

orderPending.resetConfirm: Only reset checkout after support confirms it is safe to try again. If your payment is still pending, resetting could lead to a second payment.
orderPending.title: Payment received — order pending
orderPending.description: Your payment went through, but we hit a problem while creating your order.
orderPending.supportInstructions: Contact support and quote reference <reference></reference> — we will finish setting up your order or refund your payment.
orderPending.resetHint: If support has confirmed this old warning is resolved, you can clear it and start a fresh checkout.
orderPending.resetButton: Support told me to reset checkout

downloads.inactiveBanner: 활성 라이선스가 없습니다. 라이선스 기간 중에 출시된 버전만 사용할 수 있습니다.
downloads.noLicenseBanner: 플러그인을 다운로드하려면 WCPOS Pro 라이선스가 필요합니다.
downloads.emptyList: 다운로드 가능한 버전을 찾을 수 없습니다.

discordStatus.unlinked: Discord 연결이 해제되었습니다. Discord에서 허용한 경우 Pro 역할이 제거되었습니다.

discordStatus.already_linked: 해당 Discord 계정은 이미 다른 WCPOS 고객에 연결되어 있습니다.

receiptPdf.gstNotice: {sellerName}은(는) 호주 GST에 등록되어 있지 않습니다 — GST가 청구되지 않았으며 이 문서는 세금계산서가 아닙니다.
receiptPdf.proofOfPurchase: 이 영수증은 세무 기록을 위한 구매 증빙으로 사용할 수 있습니다.

resetPassword.invalidLink: 이 링크에는 재설정 토큰이 없습니다. 이메일 클라이언트에서 잘렸을 수 있습니다. 아래에서 새 링크를 요청하세요.

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: How WCPOS collects, uses, and protects your personal data, including analytics, cookies, payment processing, and your rights under GDPR.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: WCPOS ("we", "us") operates wcpos.com, the website for the WCPOS plugin and WCPOS Pro. This policy explains what personal data we collect when you use the site, why we collect it, who processes it on our behalf, and what rights you have over it. We aim to collect as little as we need to run the service.

c1.label: Account information.
c1.body: Your email address and name when you create an account, either directly or by signing in with Google, GitHub, or Discord. When you use a sign-in provider, we receive only your basic profile (email, name or username, and avatar or picture URL) from that provider, and may store the avatar or picture URL on your account as oauth_avatar_url.

c2.label: Billing details.
c2.body: The billing address and any company details you enter at checkout, stored with your customer record so we can issue receipts and comply with tax rules.

c3.label: Order and license history.
c3.body: Records of your purchases, license keys, and plugin downloads, so you can manage your licenses and we can provide support.

c4.label: Payment information.
c4.body: Payments are handled by Stripe and PayPal. Your full card number or payment credentials never reach our servers; we receive only a payment confirmation and the details needed for the receipt.

c5.label: Usage analytics.
c5.body: We use PostHog to understand how the site is used (pages viewed, buttons clicked). To do this, we set a cookie containing a randomly generated identifier. It does not contain your name or email.

c6.label: Error reports.
c6.body: If something breaks, an error report may be sent to Sentry. Reports can include technical details such as your browser and operating system and what the application was doing at the time of the error.

c7.label: Server logs.
c7.body: Our servers keep application logs (in Grafana Loki) for debugging and operating the service.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: We use a small number of first-party cookies. We do not use third-party advertising cookies.

items.k1: medusa-token — keeps you signed in to your account. Expires after 1 day.
items.k2: wcpos-analytics-consent — remembers your analytics consent choice (accepted or declined). Expires after 182 days.
items.k3: wcpos-distinct-id — a random identifier used for analytics. Only set after you accept analytics on the consent banner; removed if you decline. Expires after 1 year.
items.k5: Your light/dark theme preference is stored locally in your browser and is never sent to us.

processors.title: Who processes your data
processors.body: We use the following service providers to run wcpos.com. Each receives only the data needed for its role:

p1.label: Our commerce backend (Medusa)
p1.body: — self-hosted on Hetzner infrastructure in the EU. Stores accounts, customer records, and orders.

p4.label: Keygen
p4.body: — software license management (license keys and activations).

items.r1: Account and license data is kept while your account is active. If you ask us to delete your account, we delete it, except where we are legally required to keep records.
items.r2: Order and invoice records are kept for as long as tax and accounting laws require.
items.r3: The analytics identifier cookie expires after 1 year.
items.r4: Server logs and error reports are kept for a limited operational window and then deleted.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: If you are in the EU/EEA or UK, you have rights under the GDPR, including the right to access, correct, delete, and export your personal data, and to object to or restrict certain processing. We extend the same rights to all users regardless of location.
rights.exercise: To exercise any of these rights, email us at <email>support@wcpos.com</email> so we can verify your identity privately. EU/EEA residents also have the right to lodge a complaint with their local data protection authority.

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.body: If we make material changes to this policy, we will update the date at the top of this page. Continued use of the site after a change means the updated policy applies.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Questions about this policy or your data? Email us at <email>support@wcpos.com</email> or ask general questions in the community chat on the <support>support page</support>.

meta.title: Refund Policy
meta.description: The WCPOS Pro refund policy: how to request a refund within 14 days of purchase, and how refunds are paid.

refunds.title: Refund Policy
refunds.intro: WCPOS Pro purchases — first purchase or renewal, yearly or lifetime — can be refunded within 14 days of purchase. Email us within that window and we refund you in full. You do not need to give a reason.

prevention.title: The best refund is the one you never need

p1.label: Install the free plugin.
p1.body: Run the free version of WCPOS on your store for a couple of days before upgrading — that proves the plugin works on your site.

p2.label: Try the demo.
p2.body: The <demo>online demo</demo> runs the current version with Pro activated, so you can confirm it fulfils your store's requirements.

p3.label: Read the documentation.
p3.body: Check the <docs>docs</docs> for the features you need, and email <email>support@wcpos.com</email> with pre-sale questions — we answer openly and honestly.

request.title: How to request a refund
request.body: Email <email>support@wcpos.com</email> from the email address you used for the purchase, within 14 days of buying. Telling us why helps us improve, but it is not required to get the refund.

payment.title: How refunds are paid
payment.body: Refunds go back to the original payment method via Stripe or PayPal and typically appear on your statement within 5–10 business days, depending on your bank or card issuer. Refunded license keys are revoked and stop working immediately.

renewals.title: License renewals
renewals.body: Yearly licenses do not renew automatically — we never charge you again without a new purchase from you. The same 14-day refund window applies to renewal purchases.

rights.title: Your statutory rights
rights.body: For consumers in the EU, EEA and UK: our 14-day refund window matches your statutory right of withdrawal for this kind of purchase, and exercising either works the same way — email us within 14 days.
rights.defective: If WCPOS Pro is defective or does not work as described, statutory remedies for faulty digital content apply at any time, independent of the 14-day window. And nothing in this policy limits any rights you have under the consumer protection laws of your country — where local law gives you stronger rights, those rights apply.

meta.title: Terms of Service
meta.description: The terms that govern your use of wcpos.com, your WCPOS account, and WCPOS Pro licenses.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of wcpos.com, your WCPOS account, and any WCPOS Pro license you purchase. By using the site or buying a license, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

service.title: The service
service.body: WCPOS provides the wcpos.com website, user accounts, and paid WCPOS Pro licenses that unlock premium features, updates, and priority support for the WCPOS plugin.

gpl.title: The free plugin and the GPL
gpl.body: The free WCPOS plugin is open-source software released under the GNU General Public License (GPL). Nothing in these terms limits the rights the GPL grants you over that code. A Pro license is separate: it covers access to Pro features, license keys, automatic updates, and priority support — not a restriction on the open-source code itself.

items.a1: Provide accurate information when registering and keep it up to date.
items.a2: Keep your credentials secure. You are responsible for activity that happens under your account.
items.a3: Tell us promptly at <email>support@wcpos.com</email> if you suspect unauthorized access to your account.

items.l1: Yearly license. A one-time payment that includes Pro features, automatic updates, and priority support for one year. It does not renew automatically and we never charge you again without a new purchase. When it expires, you can choose to renew it from your account for another year.
items.l2: Lifetime license. A one-time purchase that includes Pro features, updates, and priority support for the lifetime of the product.
items.l3: License keys are for activating WCPOS Pro on your own sites within the limits of the license you purchased. Do not share, resell, or publish license keys.
items.l4: Prices are shown at checkout before you pay. Payment is handled by Stripe or PayPal.
items.l5: Refunds are handled according to our <policy>refund policy</policy>.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.body: When using the service, you agree not to:

items.u1: Break the law or infringe the rights of others.
items.u2: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to accounts, systems, or data, or probe the service for vulnerabilities without permission.
items.u3: Interfere with the operation of the service, including overloading it or automated scraping at disruptive volumes.
items.u4: Circumvent license checks or use license keys beyond the terms of your purchase. (This does not limit your GPL rights over the open-source plugin code.)

warranty.title: Warranty disclaimer
warranty.body: The service and software are provided "as is" and "as available", without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. We do not promise that the service will be uninterrupted or error-free. Some jurisdictions do not allow certain warranty exclusions, so parts of this section may not apply to you.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, WCPOS will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages, or for lost profits, revenue, or data. Our total liability for any claim relating to the service is limited to the amount you paid us in the 12 months before the claim arose. Nothing in these terms excludes liability that cannot be excluded by law.

termination.title: Termination
termination.body: You can stop using the service and ask us to delete your account at any time. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. Sections that by their nature should survive (such as the warranty disclaimer and liability limits) survive termination.

changes.title: Changes to these terms
changes.body: If we make material changes, we will update the date at the top of this page. Continued use of the service after a change means the updated terms apply.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Questions about these terms? Email us at <email>support@wcpos.com</email> or ask in the community chat on the <support>support page</support>.

meta.title: Downloads
meta.description: Download WCPOS — the free plugin plus the desktop, iOS, Android and web apps. See the latest version and recent release notes.

hero.title: One till, every device.
hero.intelMac: On an Intel Mac? <intel>Get the Intel build</intel>
hero.pluginNotice: Every app connects to the <plugin>free WordPress plugin</plugin> — install it first.

howItFits.title: One store at the centre. Every till in sync.

setup.title: One plugin is the only setup
setup.body: The free plugin adds a secure REST API to your WooCommerce store. That’s the whole install — nothing to host or configure per device.

sync.title: Every app reads and writes the same store
sync.body: Ring up a sale on the desktop, refund it on your phone — one set of products, orders and customers, updating in real time.

offline.title: Offline-first, so the till never stops
offline.body: Each device keeps working without a connection and re-syncs the moment it’s back online.

start.title: Three steps to your first sale
start.subtitle: It takes about two minutes, start to finish.

plugin.title: Install the free plugin
plugin.body: The foundation everything connects to. In your dashboard: Plugins → Add New, then search “WCPOS”.

device.title: Pick your device
device.body: All free, all in sync. Grab the one we detected up top, or any of these.

pro.title: Want more? Go Pro
pro.body: A licensed plugin that adds terminal payments, refunds and stock control on the same foundation.
pro.cardBody: Payments, refunds, stock & pricing, order management, end-of-day reports, multi-store and priority Discord support.

releaseHistory.title: What’s new
releaseHistory.subtitle: Recent changes — every app shares one version line.

fallback.v196:
- Cash drawer support — auto-open after payment or via a new Open Drawer button, with per-printer connectors (ESC-POS, Epson, PrintNode, cloud)
- Fixed analytics events firing too often
- Updated translations
fallback.v195: - Fixed a payment-gateways API crash (HTTP 500 with some third-party gateways, e.g. ToyyibPay)
fallback.v194:
- Redesigned Bluetooth printer setup; serial printing for OS-paired Bluetooth Classic printers
- Improved Windows raw printing; smoother USB flow
fallback.v190:
- New receipt template gallery; thermal printing (58/80mm)
- Customer Tax IDs; Pro coupons & refunds at the POS
